message:
Command `# mux2_map.v DOES exist at 0fe599b2! So the errors with 8afc8346 are NOT from the current PDK.
# This means librelane is creating its own cache of the PDK resolution somewhere.
# Let's check for a librelane cache dir
find /home/user -name "*.json" -path "*cache*" -o -path "*librelane*" 2>/dev/null | head -10
echo "---"
find /tmp -name "*librelane*" -o -name "*openlane*" 2>/dev/null | head -5` executed with exit code 0.

function.arguments:
{"command": "# mux2_map.v DOES exist at 0fe599b2! So the errors with 8afc8346 are NOT from the current PDK.
# This means librelane is creating its own cache of the PDK resolution somewhere.
# Let's check for a librelane cache dir
find /home/user -name "*.json" -path "*cache*" -o -path "*librelane*" 2>/dev/null | head -10
echo "---"
find /tmp -name "*librelane*" -o -name "*openlane*" 2>/dev/null | head -5"}
function.name: execute_bash

extras.command:
# mux2_map.v DOES exist at 0fe599b2! So the errors with 8afc8346 are NOT from the current PDK.
# This means librelane is creating its own cache of the PDK resolution somewhere.
# Let's check for a librelane cache dir
find /home/user -name "*.json" -path "*cache*" -o -path "*librelane*" 2>/dev/null | head -10
echo "---"
find /tmp -name "*librelane*" -o -name "*openlane*" 2>/dev/null | head -5
